About_&_Key_Points:
About
Madhya Bharat Agro Products Ltd, part of Ostwal Group, is engaged in the business of manufacturing fertiliser and chemical products.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview
[1]
MBAPL, part of the Ostwal Group of Industries, accquired in 2004 is India's
3rd largest Private sector Phosphatic Fertiliser company
with ongoing capacities expansion from 9 lakh MTPA to ~16 lakh MTPA. Its key brands include ‘
Annadata
’ for SSP and ‘
Bharat
’ for NPK/DAP complexes.
It holds a SSP market share of 19% in Chhattisgarh and 9% in Madhya Pradesh.
